content.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `content` (
  `content_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `content_name` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL,
  `media_source` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `url` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL,
  `assigned` enum('assigned','unassigned') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unassigned',
  `progress` enum('unassigned','Assigned','Started','Partially Complete','Awaiting Evaluation','Completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unassigned',
  `users` text,
  `details` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci,
  `thumbnail` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `topic` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `subtopic` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `content_type` enum('task','reference','both') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'task',
  `is_retracted` tinyint DEFAULT '0',
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT '1',
  `canonical_url_hash` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'SHA-256 hash of canonical URL for privacy-preserving lookups',
  `canonical_url` varchar(2048) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Canonicalized version of URL (normalized, tracking params removed)',
  `content_text` text COMMENT 'Full cleaned text (up to 8000 chars) for quality analysis',
  `extraction_mode` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Extraction mode override (set by evidence rerun modal): edge, ranked, comprehensive. NULL = use global default',
  `platform` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Distribution platform: facebook, twitter, reddit, youtube, web, etc.',
  `distribution_channel` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Specific group, page, subreddit, or channel within the platform',
  `linked_url` text COMMENT 'External article or resource URL shared or embedded inside this content',
  `linked_publisher` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Publisher name or domain of the linked article',
  `social_provenance` json DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Structured social platform, container, poster, linked-source, and extraction metadata',
  PRIMARY KEY (`content_id`),
  KEY `idx_content_is_active` (`is_active`),
  KEY `idx_content_canonical_url_hash` (`canonical_url_hash`),
  KEY `idx_content_canonical_url` (`canonical_url`(255))
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16053 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publishers.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publishers` (
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `publisher_owner` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `publisher_icon` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bias_score` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `veracity_score` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `external_rating_source` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `external_rating` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `domain` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `identity_confidence` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_type` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_type_confidence` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `independent_footprint_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `conflict_of_interest_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reliability_signal_present` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `direct_reliability_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `contextual_credibility_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `provenance_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `publication_legitimacy_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reliability_cap` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reliability_cap_reason` text,
  `reliability_signal_sources` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_enriched_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`publisher_id`),
  KEY `idx_domain` (`domain`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1216 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

content_publishers.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `content_publishers` (
  `content_publisher_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `content_id` int NOT NULL,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`content_publisher_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_content_publishers` (`content_id`,`publisher_id`),
  KEY `content_publishers_fk_1_idx` (`content_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `content_publishers_fk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`content_id`) REFERENCES `content` (`content_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_content` FOREIGN KEY (`content_id`) REFERENCES `content` (`content_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3861 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_domains.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_domains` (
  `publisher_domain_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `root_domain` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `match_type` enum('exact','root','subdomain','alias') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'exact',
  `confidence` enum('high','medium','low') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'high',
  `is_platform_host` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`publisher_domain_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_pd_domain` (`domain`),
  KEY `fk_pd_publisher` (`publisher_id`),
  KEY `idx_pd_root_domain` (`root_domain`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_pd_publisher` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

publisher_ratings.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_ratings` (
  `publisher_rating_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rating_label` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rating_type` enum('bias','reliability','veracity','profile','ownership','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `url` text,
  `last_checked` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `bias_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `veracity_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `topic_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `confidence` enum('high','medium','low','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `extraction_method` enum('licensed_api','tavily_search','tavily_extract','llm_extraction','manual','community','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `evidence_quote` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_provider_payload` longtext,
  `user_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User who created this rating (NULL = system/global rating)',
  PRIMARY KEY (`publisher_rating_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_pub_source_type` (`publisher_id`,`source`(80),`rating_type`),
  KEY `idx_pr_enrichment` (`publisher_id`,`source`,`rating_type`,`last_checked`),
  CONSTRAINT `publisher_ratings_ibfk_1_cascade` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3485 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_profiles.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_profiles` (
  `publisher_profile_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `profile_url` text,
  `description` text,
  `ownership_notes` text,
  `funding_notes` text,
  `credibility_notes` text,
  `political_notes` text,
  `source_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `country` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_quote` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `confidence` enum('high','medium','low','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `extraction_method` enum('tavily_search','tavily_extract','llm_extraction','manual','community','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `last_checked` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_provider_payload` longtext,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`publisher_profile_id`),
  KEY `publisher_id` (`publisher_id`),
  KEY `idx_pp_lookup` (`publisher_id`,`source`,`last_checked`),
  CONSTRAINT `publisher_profiles_fk_cascade` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=102 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_enrichment_runs.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_enrichment_runs` (
  `enrichment_run_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `provider` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `search_query` text,
  `candidate_url` text,
  `status` enum('found','not_found','ambiguous','error','skipped_recent') DEFAULT 'found',
  `extracted_rating_label` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `extracted_bias_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `extracted_veracity_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `extracted_reliability_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_quote` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `confidence` enum('high','medium','low','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `error_message` text,
  `raw_result_json` longtext,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`enrichment_run_id`),
  KEY `idx_per_publisher` (`publisher_id`),
  KEY `idx_per_provider` (`provider`),
  KEY `idx_per_pub_prov` (`publisher_id`,`provider`,`created_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `publisher_enrichment_runs_fk_cascade` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1130 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_external_signals.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_external_signals` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `entity_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `provider` varchar(80) NOT NULL,
  `signal_type` varchar(80) NOT NULL,
  `admiralty_effect_type` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `normalized_score` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reliability_bucket` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `confidence_delta` decimal(6,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reliability_delta` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `cap` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `cap_reason` text,
  `flags` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_value` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `matched_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `matched_domain` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `match_confidence` decimal(6,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_url` text,
  `explanation` text,
  `retrieved_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `expires_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_status` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_publisher_provider` (`publisher_id`,`provider`),
  KEY `idx_domain_provider` (`domain`,`provider`),
  KEY `idx_effect` (`admiralty_effect_type`),
  KEY `idx_retrieved` (`retrieved_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=581 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_relationships.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_relationships` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `related_entity_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `related_entity_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `relationship_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `provider` varchar(80) NOT NULL,
  `evidence_url` text,
  `confidence` decimal(6,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_value` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_publisher_rel` (`publisher_id`,`relationship_type`),
  KEY `idx_provider` (`provider`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

publisher_credibility_checks.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `publisher_credibility_checks` (
  `check_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `publisher_id` int NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `checked_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `risk_level` enum('none','low','medium','high','critical','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `has_matches` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `match_count` int DEFAULT '0',
  `highest_score` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `categories` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `flags` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `risk_reasons` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `matches` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_response` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `error` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`check_id`),
  KEY `idx_publisher_id` (`publisher_id`),
  KEY `idx_source` (`source`),
  KEY `idx_checked_at` (`checked_at`),
  KEY `idx_risk_level` (`risk_level`),
  CONSTRAINT `publisher_credibility_checks_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=25 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci

source_identity_cache.createSql:
CREATE TABLE `source_identity_cache` (
  `source_identity_cache_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `source_url` varchar(2048) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `normalized_url` varchar(2048) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `root_domain` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `publisher_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `publisher_name` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_identity_kind` enum('publisher_domain','platform_hosted','primary_document','government_source','academic_source','archive_snapshot','domain_fallback','unresolved') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unresolved',
  `resolution_level` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `resolution_status` enum('matched_existing_publisher','matched_publisher_domain','matched_platform_host','matched_metadata','matched_archive','domain_only','unresolved') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unresolved',
  `source_type` enum('primary','government','academic','journalism','reference','advocacy','corporate','opinion','social','platform','unknown') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `reliability` enum('high','medium','mixed','low','flagged','unchecked') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unchecked',
  `needs_human_review` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `metadata_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_checked_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`source_identity_cache_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_sic_normalized_url` (`normalized_url`(512)),
  KEY `idx_sic_root_domain` (`root_domain`),
  KEY `idx_sic_publisher_id` (`publisher_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_sic_publisher` FOREIGN KEY (`publisher_id`) REFERENCES `publishers` (`publisher_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=470 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
